Lounge
Our Story

Above the City,
Below the Stars

Sky Lounge is Sultanpur's most talked-about dining destination — perched on the 5th floor, it offers a breathtaking open-air experience unlike anything in the city. From the vibrant colorful bar to the warm wooden interiors with cascading greenery, every detail is curated for an unforgettable evening.

Whether it's a relaxed dinner, a celebration, or just good food with great people — Sky Lounge delivers on every front.

🏙️
5th Floor Rooftop

🌿

🎨
Vibrant Interiors
Colorful bar & lounge zones

What We Serve

Crafted for Every Craving

From tandoori classics to Indo-Chinese favourites — our menu is a celebration of bold flavors.

Creamy hung-curd kababs with mild spices, crispy outside and melt-in-mouth inside.
